entries.description: Developing and testing reinforcement learning systems for decision-making and motion planning in autonomous driving. Focus on scalable self-play training, trajectory optimization, and simulation-based evaluation.

Built and tested multimodal deep learning systems for traffic sign reconstruction, detection, and recognition in autonomous driving pipelines. Worked on state-of-the-art CNN architectures for robust perception.

Optimized pose estimation techniques using reinforcement learning and deep learning for single and multi-agent systems. Implemented and tested on aerial and mobile robots with ROS and Gazebo simulation.
